_purpose: Hub security policies for safe knowledge distribution

metadata.description: Security settings for hub-spoke communication and teaching

verification.description: All taught files must be signed and verified before adoption

trust_model.description: Hub signs all upgrade-adoption-plans with its fingerprint

file_integrity.description: Each file includes hash for integrity verification

knowledge_distribution.description: Control what knowledge is distributed and to whom

compliance.description: Ensure compatibility and safety during upgrades

secrets_management.description: Secrets should never be distributed; only references

_instructions.for_hub_ai: Enforce these policies when creating and distributing upgrade plans. Refuse adoption of unsigned or unverified files.
_instructions.for_spokes: Verify all received teaching against these policies before adoption.
_instructions.updating: Update after security incidents or when refining trust model. Notify all wheels of policy changes.
